data.name: Sex Summer Camp
data.detailed_description:
Go on an exciting summer trip where you will get a huge dose of sex. The game has minimal boring scenes and solid porn scenes. It will definitely not be boring.

In the game you will find:
- One-handed play
- Hot sex stories
- 3 hot girls with their fetishes
- Ocean of passion and hot sex.

Get on board soon and fly to summer camp to fulfill your sexiest fantasies!

data.short_description: Sex Summer Camp is a visual novel where you have to go to a summer camp to meet girls and get lots of sex.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 858 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 858 MB 可用空間
